task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Approval Queue** (Level 7)

Build an approval queue. Employees submit requests (title, description, amount). The request starts as 'pending'. A logged-in approver can update the status to 'approved' or 'rejected' (this requires auth). Need: POST /api/requests (public submit), GET /api/requests (list all), GET /api/requests/pending (filtered list), PUT /api/requests/:id (update, auth required).

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend
database is local memory

owner is 'admin@example.com'
allow signup and login
log every request

create a Requests table:
  title, required
  description
  amount (number), default 0
  status, default 'pending'

# Public endpoint - submit a request
when user sends request to /api/requests:
  validate request:
    title must not be empty
  saved = save request to Requests
  send back saved with status 201

# Get all requests
when user calls GET /api/requests:
  send back all Requests

# Get pending requests
when user calls GET /api/requests/pending:
  pending = get all Requests where status is 'pending'
  send back pending

# Update request status (requires auth)
when user sends changes to /api/requests/:id:
  requires login
  save changes to Requests
  send back 'updated'
  title = ''
  description = ''
  amount = 0
# Frontend
page 'Approval Queue' at '/':
  requests = []
  pending_requests = []
  title_input = ''
  description_input = ''
  amount_input = 0
  
    'Title' is a text input saved as title
    'Description' is a text area saved as description
    'Amount' is a number input saved as amount
    get requests from '/api/requests'
    get pending_requests from '/api/requests/pending'
  
  section 'Submit Request' with style app_card:
      send title and description and amount as a new request to '/api/requests'
      title = ''
      description = ''
      amount = 0
    button 'Submit Request':
      request = {title: title_input, description: description_input, amount: amount_input}
      send request to '/api/requests'
      title_input = ''
      description_input = ''
      amount_input = 0
      get requests from '/api/requests'
      get pending_requests from '/api/requests/pending'
      get pending_requests from '/api/requests/pending'
    'Amount' is a number input saved as amount_input
    button 'Submit Request':
      send title_input and description_input and amount_input as a new request to '/api/requests'
      title_input = ''
      description_input = ''
      amount_input = 0
      get requests from '/api/requests'
      get pending_requests from '/api/requests/pending'
  
  section 'Pending Requests' with style app_card:
    display pending_requests as table with columns id, title, description, amount, status
  
  section 'All Requests' with style app_card:
    display requests as table with columns id, title, description, amount, status
